item.name: Red-spotted Blenny
item.description:
This white saltwater wavekin is flecked with spots, as if a painter flicked their brush at it.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: This fish sports a body like that of a shrimp, a head that resembles a frog's, and a pattern that one would be forgiven for mistaking for the pox. The Kojin are said to use these critters for divination, believing that everything from the size of the upcoming catch to one's romantic future can be read in the number of spots upon them.
